message:
feat(sql): add GROUP BY, SIMD vector ops, and Hash JOIN compilation

Implements remaining fused code generation features:

- GROUP BY with aggregates (COUNT, SUM, AVG, MIN, MAX)
  - Two-phase generation: group accumulation + output
  - Proper type resolution from input columns

- SIMD vector operations for distance functions
  - New simd_ops.zig with cosine_distance, l2_distance, dot_product
  - 8-wide SIMD vectorization with scalar fallback
  - Auto-detection and code generation in fused queries

- Hash JOIN compilation
  - Build/probe architecture for efficient joins
  - Separate LeftColumns/RightColumns structs
  - Linear probe (can optimize with hash later)

Also fixes:
- SELECT * column name handling (skip "*" in codegen)
- Proper type resolution for GROUP BY and aggregates
